rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate natural resonant frequency of a spring-mass system.
description.long: Calculate natural resonant frequency of a spring-mass system.

short_i18n.en: Calculate natural resonant frequency of a spring-mass system.
short_i18n.tr: Sistemin genliginin Maximuma ulastigi dogal titresim Frequencyini (rezonans) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die naturliche Resonanzfrequenz eines Feder-Masse-Systems.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la fréquence de résonance naturelle d'un système masse-ressort.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la frecuencia de resonancia natural de un sistema masa-resorte.
short_i18n.ar: احسب تردد الرنين الطبيعي لنظام كتلة-زنبرك.

long_i18n.en: Calculate natural resonant frequency of a spring-mass system.
long_i18n.tr: Sistemin genliginin Maximuma ulastigi dogal titresim Frequencyini (rezonans) hesaplar.
long_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die naturliche Resonanzfrequenz eines Feder-Masse-Systems.
long_i18n.fr: Calculer la fréquence de résonance naturelle d'un système masse-ressort.
long_i18n.es: Calcular la frecuencia de resonancia natural de un sistema masa-resorte.
long_i18n.ar: احسب تردد الرنين الطبيعي لنظام كتلة-زنبرك.
